templates.name: Newsletter Welcome Email
templates.subject: Thanks for joining SetVenue
templates.previewText: Here's what to expect from your newsletter subscription.

body.headline: Thanks for joining — here's what to expect
body.intro: You're on the list for new locations, exclusive deals, and occasional production tips from SetVenue.

sections.title: How to browse
sections.content: Use the marketplace to compare locations, crew stays, and event venues. Filter by city, type, price, or production need. Start with featured listings for standout options.

sections.title: How to list
sections.content: If you have a property to offer, use the List Your Property page to submit the basics. SetVenue is built for hosts who want clear expectations and quality bookings — with 0% host fees.

sections.title: FAQ
sections.content: Need more detail first? Visit the FAQ for booking flow, privacy tiers, and host requirements.

body.footer: We do not sell your email. You can update preferences or unsubscribe in one click at any time.
